caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with bold text on it. The setting appears to be a casual yet professional environment, possibly a studio within a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the space. The man seems engaged and animated, smiling and looking off to the side, suggesting he is interacting with someone or something outside the frame. The overall atmosphere is lively and conversational, indicative of an ongoing discussion or interview.
